tasks.title: Add tests to bring internal/output from 63.2% to 94%+ coverage
tasks.description: Add tests to bring internal/output from 63.2% to 94%+ coverage
tasks.body: This package has the largest gap. Identify all uncovered paths and add comprehensive tests.

tasks.title: Add tests to bring internal/logging from 87.6% to 94%+ coverage
tasks.description: Add tests to bring internal/logging from 87.6% to 94%+ coverage
tasks.body: Identify uncovered code paths in internal/logging/*.go and add tests.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Coverage: internal/output & internal/logging is complete and correct

breadcrumbs.text: Added deep coverage tests for internal/output (63.2% → 98.7%). Fixed latent deadlock in Spinner.Stop where unbuffered stop channel could drop the signal. Extracted isTerminal as a swappable var to test the goroutine code paths. All functions at 100% except IsTerminal error branch (75%).

Added writeConsole coverage tests for internal/logging (87.6% → 94.4%). Covered suppressed types, failure_increment formatting, consoleMessages lookup, and empty-string suppression branch. Remaining uncovered: compressFile io.Copy/gz.Close/out.Close error paths (require I/O fault injection) and one EnforceRetention line.

Audit complete: verified build, tests (with -race), vet, gofmt, coverage (output 98.7%, logging 94.4%), and code correctness. Buffered stop channel fix is sound. Test seam via isTerminal var is clean. ConsoleMessages mutation test correctly avoids t.Parallel(). No gaps found.

audit.result_summary: Raised internal/output coverage from 63.2% to 98.7% and internal/logging from 87.6% to 94.4%. The output work added tests for the spinner goroutine path (via an isTerminal test seam), pause/resume lifecycle, active-spinner ownership, and all renderFrame positions. A latent deadlock in Spinner.Stop was fixed by buffering the stop channel. The logging work covered writeConsole branches: suppressed types, failure_increment formatting, consoleMessages lookup, unknown-type fallback, bare records, and empty-string suppression. Both packages pass with -race and exceed the 90% coverage floor.
